The '''Kibo Plateau''' was an area of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was north of the settlement [[Barrens]] and south of [[ChikatLik]], and the plateau contained [[Kibo Lake]].

{{Nature-stub}}
